purpose: Make Virtual Context Memory (VCM) the shared memory/context substrate for every major Theseus task family, not a sidecar benchmark lane.

task_families.label: Operator Chat And Daily Use
task_families.notes: User-facing chat must receive VCM state, personality context, current project state, and correction-memory writeback.

task_families.label: Autonomy Loop And Governance
task_families.notes: Autonomy cycles must load VCM before deciding task pressure, teacher use, training, or promotion state.

task_families.label: Code Repair, Decoder, And Training
task_families.notes: Training and decoder work may use VCM as context only; training rows still require the VCM training-admission bridge.

task_families.label: Public Calibration And Anti-Cheat Review
task_families.notes: Public benchmark content is calibration-only; VCM may expose aggregate/hashes/categories, never public training rows.

task_families.label: Teacher Proposal Governance
task_families.notes: Teacher use remains architecture/proposal only unless governed distillation gates explicitly allow training-time use.

task_families.label: Hive Nodes, Storage, And File Routing
task_families.notes: Hive/storage coverage is still thin in the current VCM index; this task family must stay visible until node/storage reports become first-class VCM pages.

task_families.label: Voice, Spatial, And Room-Aware Operation
task_families.notes: Voice-following and spatial operation should consume VCM summaries and capability pages, not raw always-on audio/video.

task_families.label: Runtime, MLX, Metal, And Accelerator Routing
task_families.notes: Mac runtime work can use semantic materialization descriptors, but VCM-Runtime native KV/cache behavior remains not claimed.

task_families.label: Documentation And Project State
task_families.notes: Docs should reflect the same VCM task-context contract used by runtime gates.
